---
title: "List of publications"
unnumbered: true
prelim: true
---

{{< meta uomthesis.candidate.surname >}}, {{< meta uomthesis.candidate.forename >}}. & Co-author, A. (2026). *Title of the first paper.* Journal Name, in press.

{{< meta uomthesis.candidate.surname >}}, {{< meta uomthesis.candidate.forename >}}., Co-author, A. & Co-author, B. (2026). *Title of the second paper.* Manuscript under review.

{{< meta uomthesis.candidate.surname >}}, {{< meta uomthesis.candidate.forename >}}. & Co-author, C. (2026). *Title of the third paper.* Manuscript in preparation.
